id.description: The unique ID of the self-service Profile.

name.description: The name of the self-service Profile.

description.description: The description of the self-service Profile.

user_attributes.description: List of attributes to be mapped that will be shown to the user during the Self-Service Enterprise Configuration flow.

created_at.description: The time when this self-service Profile was created.

updated_at.description: The time when this self-service Profile was updated.

allowed_strategies.description: List of IdP strategies that will be shown to users during the Self-Service Enterprise Configuration flow. Possible values: [`oidc`, `samlp`, `waad`, `google-apps`, `adfs`, `okta`, `auth0-samlp`, `okta-samlp`, `keycloak-samlp`, `pingfederate`]

user_attribute_profile_id.description: ID of the user-attribute-profile to associate with this self-service profile.
